{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01NzXNG63GHnx8cZQN2NgdZv","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01F5YZBJcVKMA4hFucop6eHG","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/bh.py << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np, pandas as pd\n\nWORK_START=9; WORK_END=17; WORK_LEN=(WORK_END-WORK_START)*3600\nANCHOR=np.datetime64('2024-01-01')  # Monday\n\ndef business_seconds_cumulative(ts):\n    \"\"\"business seconds elapsed from ANCHOR to each timestamp (Series of datetime64).\"\"\"\n    ts = pd.to_datetime(ts)\n    dates = ts.values.astype('datetime64[D]')\n    # weekdays strictly before this date\n    full_days = np.busday_count(ANCHOR, dates)  # counts Mon-Fri in [ANCHOR, date)\n    full_secs = full_days.astype(np.float64) * WORK_LEN\n    # seconds into the day\n    secs_into_day = (ts.values - dates.astype('datetime64[s]')).astype('timedelta64[s]').astype(np.float64)\n    within = np.clip(secs_into_day - WORK_START*3600, 0, WORK_LEN)\n    # zero out weekend dates\n    is_wd = np.is_busday(dates)\n    within = np.where(is_wd, within, 0.0)\n    return full_secs + within\n\ndef business_hours_between(start, end):\n    cs = business_seconds_cumulative(start)\n    ce = business_seconds_cumulative(end)\n    return (ce - cs)/3600.0\nEOF\necho \"written\"","description":"Write business-hours helper module"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1989,"cache_read_input_tokens":29113,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1989,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":75,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a1dff145-bd08-4931-97fd-615aaead54d1","uuid":"a8bdabbe-887e-4eef-be4d-1a562f7ad700","request_id":"req_011CbfA4v3tYbztyJiFjioaY"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01KKaYWZSzUt7MQinVX693ws","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01CjW4ZM43SRpA4xAsNoTk4b","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np\nfrom bh import business_hours_between\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\ntask = pd.read_csv('task_001.csv')\nemp = pd.read_csv('employee_001.csv')\nta = ta.merge(task[['task_id','complexity_score','risk_score','priority','task_type']], on='task_id', how='left')\nta['hold_bh'] = business_hours_between(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\nta['log_hold'] = np.log1p(ta.hold_bh)\n\n# Examine: within role, does complexity matter? check a few roles\nfor r in ['implement','tester','code_reviewer','design']:\n    sub=ta[ta.assignment_role==r]\n    print(r, \"corr(hold,complexity)=%.3f\"%sub[['hold_bh','complexity_score']].corr().iloc[0,1],\n          \"corr(hold,risk)=%.3f\"%sub[['hold_bh','risk_score']].corr().iloc[0,1])\n# So model log_hold ~ role*complexity.   cur+=d; mx=max(mx,cur)\n    return mx\nconc = ta.groupby('employee_id').apply(max_concurrent, include_groups=False)\n\n# meetings\nmp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in msg.groupby('sender_id').size()\nrecv = msg.groupby('receiver_id').size()\n\nw = {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01XeQUhyovm6At59tw3TiEqU","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Ld8AfkBAsPtR69BeNsEZCs","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np\nfrom bh import business_hours_between\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\ntask = pd.read_csv('task_001.csv')\nemp = pd.read_csv('employee_001.csv')\nta = ta.merge(task[['task_id','complexity_score']], on='task_id', how='left')\nta['hold_bh']=business_hours_between(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\n\n# For each candidate, compare their hold to peer median for same role\ndef peerz(eid):\n    sub=ta[ta.employee_id==eid]\n    rows=[]\n    for r,g in sub.groupby('assignment_role'):\n        peers=ta[(ta.assignment_role==r)]\n        rows.append((r,len(g),g.hold_bh.mean(),peers.hold_bh.median(),peers.hold_bh.mean()))\n    return rows\nfor eid in [123,222,281,282]:\n    role=emp.loc[emp.employee_id==eid,'role'].iloc[0]\n    sen=emp.loc[emp.employee_id==eid,'seniority_level'].iloc[0]\n    print(f\"\\n=== emp {eid} ({sen} {role}) ===\")\n    for r,n,mh,pm,pmean in peerz(eid):\n        print(f\"  {r:22s} n={n:3d} their_mean={mh:6.2f}h  peer_median={pm:5.2f}h  ratio={mh/pm:4.1f}x\")\nEOF","description":"Per-role hold comparison for top 4 candidates"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2135,"cache_read_input_tokens":39450,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2135,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":43,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a1dff145-bd08-4931-97fd-615aaead54d1","uuid":"3a72d828-04ea-43e3-9c72-a6962f46ec83","request_id":"req_011CbfADAdDH1v3McNU3mGC9"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_013E7J5G77LDnrabEbAeLAq7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DeQ4SPcsZVj5u9saGexKAN","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np\nfrom bh import business_hours_between\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\ntask = pd.read_csv('task_001.csv'); emp = pd.read_csv('employee_001.csv')\nta = ta.merge(task[['task_id','complexity_score']], on='task_id', how='left')\nta['hold']=business_hours_between(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\nta['logh']=np.log1p(ta.hold)\n# expected per (role,complexity) using ROBUST median; ratio in log space\nta['exp']=ta.groupby(['assignment_role','complexity_score'])['logh'].transform('median')\nta['resid']=ta.logh-ta['exp']\n\n# Per-employee delay: trimmed mean residual + share of assignments that are >2x slow\npeer_med = ta.groupby(['assignment_role','complexity_score'])['hold'].transform('median')\nta['ratio']=ta.hold/peer_med\nde = ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n=('resid','count'),\n        mean_resid=('resid','mean'),\n        med_resid=('resid','median'),\n        frac_2x=('ratio',lambda s:(s>2).mean())).reset_index()\n\n# Workload (peer-normalized within seniority)\nmp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('meeting_participant_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nmsg = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('message_metadata_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nW=pd.DataFrame({'employee_id':emp.employee_id})\nW['meetings']=W.employee_id.map(mp.groupby('employee_id').size()).fillna(0)\nW['msg']=W.employee_id.map(msg.groupby('sender_id').size().add(msg.groupby('receiver_id').size(),fill_value=0)).fillna(0)\nW['n_assign']=W.employee_id.map(ta.groupby('employee_id').size()).fillna(0)\nW=W.merge(emp[['employee_id','role','seniority_level']],on='employee_id')\ndef z(s): \n    return (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0) if s.std(ddof=0)>0 else s*0\nfor col in ['meetings','msg','n_assign']:\n    W[col+'_z']=W.groupby('seniority_level')[col].transform(z)\nW['overload_z']=W[['meetings_z','msg_z','n_assign_z']].max(axis=1)\n\nM=de.merge(W,on='employee_id')\nM['delay_z']=z(M['mean_resid'])\nprint(\"=== Sorted by delay (mean_resid) ===\")\nprint(M.sort_values('mean_resid',ascending=False).head(12)[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','n','mean_resid','frac_2x','overload_z']].to_string(index=False))\nprint(\"\\n=== Sorted by overload_z (peer-normalized max of meetings/msg/assign) ===\")\nprint(M.sort_values('overload_z',ascending=False).head(12)[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','meetings','msg','n_assign','overload_z','mean_resid']].to_string(index=False))\nEOF","description":"Combined delay + peer-normalized overload outliers"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2367,"cache_read_input_tokens":41585,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2367,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":48,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a1dff145-bd08-4931-97fd-615aaead54d1","uuid":"60ddc6c4-1859-4ec9-859a-9fabaaa95c5b","request_id":"req_011CbfAENoDegffNG7sQk1uK"}

<< 'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np\nfrom bh import business_hours_between\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\ntask = pd.read_csv('task_001.csv')\nta = ta.merge(task[['task_id','complexity_score']], on='task_id', how='left')\nta['hold']=business_hours_between(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\npeer_med = ta.groupby(['assignment_role','complexity_score'])['hold'].transform('median')\nta['ratio']=ta.hold/peer_med\nf = ta.groupby('employee_id')['ratio'].agg(n='count', frac2x=lambda s:(s>2).mean(), gmean=lambda s:np.exp(np.log(s).mean()))\nprint(\"Employees with frac(>2x slower) >= 0.5  (min 5 assignments):\")\nprint(f[(f.frac2x>=0.5)&(f.n>=5)].sort_values('frac2x',ascending=False).to_string())\nprint(\"\\nFull distribution of frac2x (how many exceed each cutoff):\")\nfor c in [0.3,0.4,0.5,0.6,0.8]:\n    print(f\"  frac2x >= {c}: {(f[f.n>=5].frac2x>=c).sum()} employees\")\n\n# Critical path / blocking check\ndep = pd.read_csv('task_dependency_001.csv')\ndep['block_dur']=business_hours_between(dep.created_at, dep.resolved_at)\n# who is assigned (as worker, not reviewer) to blocking tasks\nwork_roles=['implement','design','owner','tester','triage','investigate','deployer','verify',\n            'parallel_implementation']\nworker = ta[ta.assignment_role.isin(['implement','design','owner','tester','triage','investigate','deployer','verify','decompose'])]\nblk_tasks = set(dep.blocking_task_id)\ncand=[123,222,281,282]\nfor eid in cand:\n    mytasks=set(ta[ta.employee_id==eid].task_id)\n    blocking = mytasks & blk_tasks\n    print(f\"emp {eid}: assigned to {len(mytasks)} tasks, of which {len(blocking)} are BLOCKING other tasks\")\nEOF","description":"Final gap + blocking-path
